## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Dual-Language & API Design Parity
SmoothAPI maintains feature parity between its TypeScript and Python packages. Please describe how this feature/configuration should look in both languages:

### TypeScript Configuration/API
```typescript
// Proposed TS API design / usage
```

### Python Configuration/API
```python
# Proposed Python API design / usage
```

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or diagrams about the feature request here.
